query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.projectId, ap.prompt, ap.detailedPlan, p.name 
FROM actionPlans ap 
JOIN projects p ON ap.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%TRANSPORTE%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 7QDB1rdZo1Phrn3.bcf291fc06f4 --database A6U3GSLMGWuR2P4b85Hiyy --execute SELECT ap.id, ap.projectId, ap.prompt, ap.detailedPlan, p.name 
FROM actionPlans ap 
JOIN projects p ON ap.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%TRANSPORTE%';
